title.en: Merino the unlikely hero again - as Spain wait for Lamine Yamal show
title.zh-CN: 美利奴再次成为不太可能的英雄--西班牙等待拉明·亚马尔的演出

summary.en: Mikel Merino came off the bench to send Spain into the World Cup semi-finals - but Lamine Yamal is still waiting for his moment to truly shine.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·梅里诺（ Mikel Merino ）从替补席上下来，将西班牙队送入世界杯半决赛-但拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）仍在等待他的时刻真正闪耀。

title.en: Lammens' error spells end for Belgium's golden generation
title.zh-CN: Lammens的错误拼写结束了比利时的黄金一代

summary.en: Belgium's World Cup campaign ends after Senne Lammens' error against Spain - could it all be over for their golden generation too?
summary.zh-CN: 在塞纳·拉门斯（ Senne Lammens ）对西班牙的失误之后，比利时的世界杯活动结束了-他们的黄金一代是否也会结束？

title.en: How do England stop Norway - and Haaland?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰如何阻止挪威和哈兰德？

summary.en: As England prepare to face Norway in a World Cup quarter-final on Saturday, how can Thomas Tuchel's side handle the main threat - star striker Erling Haaland?
summary.zh-CN: 随着英格兰准备在周六的世界杯四分之一决赛中面对挪威，托马斯·图切尔的球队如何应对主要威胁-明星前锋埃尔林·哈兰德？

title.en: Hacking worry for Argentine FA over World Cup emails
title.zh-CN: 通过世界杯电子邮件黑客攻击阿根廷足协的担忧

summary.en: Argentina's football association signals it may have suffered a cyber attack after emails from its accounts reportedly criticised refereeing in the dramatic win against Egypt at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷足球协会表示，它可能遭受了网络攻击，此前据报道，其账户中的电子邮件批评裁判在世界杯上击败埃及的戏剧性胜利。

title.en: 'Influential' Lamine Yamal has 'more to give' to Spain
title.zh-CN: “有影响力”的拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）为西班牙“付出了更多”

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Cesar Azpilicueta and Wayne Rooney look at how Lamine Yamal performed against Belgium and feel there is "more to come" from the Spain forward.

title.en: Haaland & Heggem inspiring Baggies' striker Heggebo

summary.en: West Bromwich Albion striker Aune Heggebo says watching Erling Haaland and his old Baggies team-mate Torbjorn Heggem exploits for Norway at the World Cup has been amazing.
summary.zh-CN: West Bromwich Albion前锋Aune Heggebo表示，观看Erling Haaland和他的老Baggies队友Torbjorn Heggem在世界杯上为挪威队效力的表现令人惊叹。
